_comment: Shipped preset for Relight via Qwen-Image-Edit 2509 + dedicated Relight LoRA. Adapted from ComfyUI's image_qwen_image_edit_2509_relight template. RelightStage builds the natural-language prompt from its brightness/color/rim_light widgets via _relight_prompt() and passes it as main_prompt; we bind that to the inner PrimitiveStringMultiline (#15). The StringConcatenate (#14) is left baked — it prepends '重新照明,' (Chinese for 'relight,') which Qwen-Edit handles fine. Models referenced: Qwen-Image-Edit 2509 fp8 + 2509 Relight LoRA + 2509 Lightning 4-step LoRA. See workflows/relight/README.md for download URLs.
label: Qwen Edit 2509 Relight
description: Relight an image via Qwen-Image-Edit 2509 + the dedicated Relight LoRA. 4-step Lightning sampling (~3-5 sec on a 24GB+ GPU). RelightStage's brightness / color / rim_light widgets feed into main_prompt via _relight_prompt(); the workflow drops that into Qwen-Edit's text encoder.

image.error: Relight needs an upstream image — wire one into this stage's image input.

value.default: relight the image with natural daylight, preserving subject identity
